6.t: And them that are turned back
and those that have not sought

8.t: And it shall come to pass in the day
and all such as are clothed

10.t: And it shall come to pass in that day
that there shall be the noise

12.t: And it shall come to pass at that time

5.t: thee that there shall be no inhabitant
thee that there shall be no inhabitant

10.t: This shall they have for their pride

11.t: unto them for he will famish

15.t: I am and there is none beside
me how is she become a desolation

6.t: so that there is no man

11.t: against me for then I will take away

13.t: and none shall make them afraid

15.t: of thee thou shalt not see

18.t: who are of thee to whom the reproach

19.t: where they have been put to shame
